title: Resolution Congratulating and Commending Mr. Joseph Navasero, Cooperative Development Specialist I of Municipal Agriculture's Office and Owner and Founder of Insiklo Ph for Winning the Third Prize in the Recently Concluded Ecothon Philippines 2023 Hosted by the Department of Trade and Industry (DTI) - Competitiveness Bureau Last August 30, 2023 at Makati Diamond Residences, Makati City. Councilor(s) Leren Mae M. Bautista, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Jonathan Bryan S. Siytiap, Miko C. Pelegrina, Mark Le
